channel.title: Database on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in Database on Notities

item.title: Concourse persistent PostgreSQL database in Docker
item.description: $ sudo docker-compose stop concourse-db $ sudo docker ps $ sudo docker cp -a <docker postgresql database id>:/database .\ $ vim docker-compose.yml image: postgres volumes: \["./database:/database"] environment: $ sudo docker-compose up -d --no-deps concourse-db
